title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates using Claude Code to build a revenue-generating app from zero coding experience to $481k ARR in 45 days. The video covers five practical steps: starting with problems before shipping, strategically choosing what to engineer versus reuse, learning technical vocabulary for better prompts, planning thoroughly before building, and identifying failure points systematically.
